sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102982" key="telesfo/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τελεσφόρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n102982.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mature development</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:16:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
